sm.$description: Small border radius for inputs and tags

md.$description: Medium border radius for buttons and cards

lg.$description: Large border radius for large cards and modals

xl.$description: Extra large border radius for hero cards

full.$description: Full border radius for pills and avatars

default.$description: Default border color in light mode

emphasis.$description: Emphasized border color in light mode

subtle.$description: Subtle border color in light mode

interactive.$description: Interactive element border color in light mode

error.$description: Error state border color in light mode

success.$description: Success state border color in light mode

default.$description: Default border color in dark mode

emphasis.$description: Emphasized border color in dark mode

subtle.$description: Subtle border color in dark mode

interactive.$description: Interactive element border color in dark mode

error.$description: Error state border color in dark mode

success.$description: Success state border color in dark mode
